input.content:
name: PR Label Assigner

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      files_path:
        description: Path to JSON file containing changed file list
        required: false
        default: fixtures/files.json
      rules_path:
        description: Path to JSON file containing label rules
        required: false
        default: rules.json

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  assign-labels:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      FILES_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.files_path || 'fixtures/files.json' }}
      RULES_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.rules_path || 'rules.json' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
          echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Show Bun version
        run: bun --version

      - name: Run labeler tests
        run: bun test

      - name: Assign labels
        id: labels
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Files input: $FILES_PATH"
          echo "Rules input: $RULES_PATH"
          OUTPUT=$(bun run index.ts --files "$FILES_PATH" --rules "$RULES_PATH" --format json)
          echo "Raw output: $OUTPUT"
          echo "result=$OUTPUT" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "LABELS_JSON=$OUTPUT"
          echo "::notice::LABELS_JSON=$OUTPUT"

      - name: Print summary
        run: |
          echo "Labeler produced: ${{ steps.labels.outputs.result }}"

name: PR Label Assigner

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      files_path:
        description: Path to JSON file containing changed file list
        required: false
        default: fixtures/files.json
      rules_path:
        description: Path to JSON file containing label rules
        required: false
        default: rules.json

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  assign-labels:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      FILES_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.files_path || 'fixtures/files.json' }}
      RULES_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.rules_path || 'rules.json' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
          echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Show Bun version
        run: bun --version

      - name: Run labeler tests
        run: bun test

      - name: Assign labels
        id: labels
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Files input: $FILES_PATH"
          echo "Rules input: $RULES_PATH"
          OUTPUT=$(bun run index.ts --files "$FILES_PATH" --rules "$RULES_PATH" --format json)
          echo "Raw output: $OUTPUT"
          echo "result=$OUTPUT" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "LABELS_JSON=$OUTPUT"
          echo "::notice::LABELS_JSON=$OUTPUT"

      - name: Print summary
        run: |
          echo "Labeler produced: ${{ steps.labels.outputs.result }}"

content.text:
Done. Summary:

**Files created:**
- `labeler.ts` — core logic: `assignLabels(files, rules)` with Bun.Glob matching, multi-label support, priority ordering, dedup, error handling
- `labeler.test.ts` — 10 unit tests (TDD: written first, failed, then implemented)
- `index.ts` — CLI entrypoint reading JSON files/rules, emits labels as JSON or lines
- `rules.json` — sample rules with priority ordering (api < frontend < documentation < tests < ci < config)
- `fixtures/files.json` — default mock changed-file list
- `.github/workflows/pr-label-assigner.yml` — installs Bun, runs unit tests, runs labeler, prints `LABELS_JSON=...` via `::notice::`
- `workflow.test.ts` — runs `act push --rm` for 3 distinct fixture sets, asserts exit 0, "Job succeeded", and exact label arrays per case
- `act-result.txt` — appended per-case act output (3 cases × Job succeeded)

**Results:** `bun test` → 15 pass, 0 fail. actionlint clean. Three `act push` runs all green with the expected exact label sets: `[api,frontend,documentation]`, `[tests]`, `[ci,config]`.

result:
Done. Summary:

**Files created:**
- `labeler.ts` — core logic: `assignLabels(files, rules)` with Bun.Glob matching, multi-label support, priority ordering, dedup, error handling
- `labeler.test.ts` — 10 unit tests (TDD: written first, failed, then implemented)
- `index.ts` — CLI entrypoint reading JSON files/rules, emits labels as JSON or lines
- `rules.json` — sample rules with priority ordering (api < frontend < documentation < tests < ci < config)
- `fixtures/files.json` — default mock changed-file list
- `.github/workflows/pr-label-assigner.yml` — installs Bun, runs unit tests, runs labeler, prints `LABELS_JSON=...` via `::notice::`
- `workflow.test.ts` — runs `act push --rm` for 3 distinct fixture sets, asserts exit 0, "Job succeeded", and exact label arrays per case
- `act-result.txt` — appended per-case act output (3 cases × Job succeeded)

**Results:** `bun test` → 15 pass, 0 fail. actionlint clean. Three `act push` runs all green with the expected exact label sets: `[api,frontend,documentation]`, `[tests]`, `[ci,config]`.
